hooks.command: echo '=== Project Local Directories ==='; echo '~/.nsys-symbols          — CUDA symbol cache (nsys profiling, first run slow, subsequent instant)'; echo '~/results/nsight/        — nsys profiling output (.nsys-rep, .sqlite, BAM files)'; echo '~/kraken2-build/         — Kraken-2 built from source with -pg flag (NOT YET CREATED)'; echo '================================'
cd ~/memory && git pull origin hobbbit 2>/dev/null || true
